source_locked_behavior.statement: The command queue is locked, then I34E/I34M/A36M/A35E/A35M media check queued command count via G2153_i_QueuedCommandsCount before dequeue.
The command value is read from G0432_as_CommandQueue[G0433_i_CommandQueueFirstIndex].Command and movement-disable gates are checked before accepting movement commands.
The accepted command X/Y payload is read, queued-command count is decremented for I34E-family builds, first index advances with wrap, and the queue lock is released.
Turn commands dispatch to F0365_COMMAND_ProcessTypes1To2_TurnParty; movement commands dispatch to F0366_COMMAND_ProcessTypes3To6_MoveParty.

debugger_watch_candidates.watch: break/watch where L1160_i_Command is loaded from G0432_as_CommandQueue[G0433_i_CommandQueueFirstIndex].Command
debugger_watch_candidates.purpose: Prove the accepted command value for turn_left_once before dispatch.

debugger_watch_candidates.watch: watch G2153_i_QueuedCommandsCount, G0433_i_CommandQueueFirstIndex, and G0435_B_CommandQueueLocked writes
debugger_watch_candidates.purpose: Prove dequeue acceptance state transition before ProcessPendingClick.

debugger_watch_candidates.watch: break at F0365_COMMAND_ProcessTypes1To2_TurnParty and F0366_COMMAND_ProcessTypes3To6_MoveParty entry
debugger_watch_candidates.purpose: Link accepted command to turn or movement handler.

runtime_evidence.reason: No DOSBox/dosbox-debug/DOSBox-X runtime breakpoint or memory-watch hit was captured in this pass. Symbol-map promotion remains blocked until runtime evidence binds FIRES.EXENEW addresses to this source seam.
